zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Vieuxpont II於大約1130年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire時，他的父親William De Vieuxpont I22歲，母親Emma St Hilary11歲。他於1157年與Maud de Morville在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1203年在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Vieuxpont II于大约1130年出生在苏格兰Linlithgowshire时，他的父亲William De Vieuxpont I22岁，母亲Emma St Hilary11岁。他于1157年与Maud de Morville在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1203年在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Vieuxpont II was born about 1130, in Linlithgowshire, Scotland, his father, William De Vieuxpont I, was 22 and his mother, Emma St Hilary, was 11. He married Maud de Morville in 1157, in Appleby, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1203, in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Vieuxpont II est né environ 1130, à Linlithgowshire, Écosse, son père, William De Vieuxpont I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma St Hilary, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Morville en 1157, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1203, à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Vieuxpont II um 1130 in Linlithgowshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Vieuxpont I 22 und seine Mutter Emma St Hilary 11. Er hat 1157 in Appleby, Westmorland, England Maud de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1203 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Vieuxpont II è nato il circa 1130 nel Linlithgowshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William De Vieuxpont I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Emma St Hilary, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Morville nel 1157, nel Appleby, Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1203, nel Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Vieuxpont IIが約1130年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireで生まれた時，父William De Vieuxpont Iは22歳，母Emma St Hilaryは11歳であった。1157年にイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーでMaud de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1203年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Vieuxpont II(이)가 대략 1130년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Vieuxpont I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma St Hilary(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1157년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 Maud de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 영국 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1130–Abt 1203: tany ho any amin'ny 1130–tany ho any amin'ny 1203

mn.Carriden, West Lothian, Scotland: Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Vieuxpont II nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Linlithgowshire, Scotland, seu pai, William De Vieuxpont I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma St Hilary, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Morville em 1157, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1203, em Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Vieuxpont II родился около 1130 г. в местности Linlithgowshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William De Vieuxpont I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma St Hilary, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Morville в 1157 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1203 г. в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

sm.about 1130–Abt 1203: e tusa o le 1130–e tusa o le 1203

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Vieuxpont II nació aproximadamente 1130, en Linlithgowshire, Scotland, su papá, William De Vieuxpont I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Emma St Hilary, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Maud de Morville en 1157, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1203, en Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
